raw_consumer_statement:
This is a follow-up to a previous CFPB complaint I submitted regarding a charge dispute on my Citi XXXX card. I am still experiencing issues and want to formally request that the matter be reviewed by a XXXX dispute XXXX. 
My previous dispute was handled by offshore representatives who failed to resolve the issue effectively. There were multiple miscommunications and delays, and Ive been unable to speak with anyone based in the XXXX, despite repeated requests. 
I am asking that Citi escalate this dispute to a XXXX disputes department or XXXX resolution team so the issue can be reviewed properly. 
My original CFPB complaint number is XXXX I would appreciate your assistance in ensuring this matter is directed to someone in the United States who XXXX properly review the case and follow up with me. 

I have spoken with the merchant and XXXX told me they are trying to refund the charge back to my Citi card but the card is preventing.
